copy.black_left_seat_in_the_list_goes_first_t: Black (left seat in the list) goes first; turns alternate.
copy.move_diagonally_forward_kings_move_on_al: Move diagonally forward; kings move on all diagonals.
copy.multi_jumps_with_the_same_piece_continue: Multi-jumps with the same piece continue until no more captures.
